# Simple Memo (Captio-style)

> A lightweight iOS app that sends memos to your email inbox with one tap. Released in 2026 as a Captio alternative after Captio shut down. Features 0.3s launch, 150ms send, offline support via Outbox architecture, and AES-GCM encryption. Free tier: 3 sends/day. Premium: unlimited at ¥500/month or ¥5,000/year.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://simplememofast.com/): Product overview, features, pricing, FAQ
- [About](https://simplememofast.com/about/): Team and company information
- [Note-to-Email Concept](https://simplememofast.com/note-to-email/): How the email memo workflow works
- [Captio Method](https://simplememofast.com/captio/): The Captio-style methodology explained
- [Captio Alternative](https://simplememofast.com/captio-alternative/): Why Simple Memo replaces Captio
- [FAQ](https://simplememofast.com/faq): Frequently asked questions
- [Contact](https://simplememofast.com/contact): Support and inquiries

- [Custom Domain](https://simplememofast.com/guides/custom-domain/): Configure with custom domain email

## Pricing
- Free: 7-day unlimited trial, then 3 sends/day
- Premium Monthly: ¥500/month ($2.99) - unlimited sends
- Premium Yearly: ¥5,000/year ($29.99) - unlimited sends

## Contact
- Email: support@simplememofast.com
- Website: https://simplememofast.com/contact
